title: pronephrium peltatum
intro: Pronephrium peltatum, also known as the shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Marattiaceae, characterized by its rounded fronds and peltate pinnae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pronephrium peltatum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system function. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions, including fever and cough.
